runners.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th on April 8 over 352m at this track behind Stained Aces beaten 23 lengths (21.31) in a Restricted WIN. Has performed below expectations at her last couple but is capable of far better.

runners.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 352m in 19.95 last start, beating Tuta Interval. Can make it back to back wins.
